SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Crafting Excellence Across Oklahoma City

Ralph Goodman Finish Carpentry started with a simple goal: to bring unparalleled carpentry skills to the Oklahoma City metro. Founded by Ralph Goodman, a lifelong woodworker with a passion for precision, we've grown from a small operation to a trusted name in residential and commercial carpentry.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our approach is rooted in meticulous planning, careful material selection, and expert execution. We're committed to transparent communication, respecting your budget, and exceeding your expectations.

We're proud to be a part of the Oklahoma City community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities. We understand the unique challenges our climate presents to Oklahoma homes and businesses, and we build accordingly.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Ralph Goodman Finish Carpentry

Unmatched Craftsmanship

Decades of experience and a commitment to quality ensure every project is flawlessly executed.

Local Expertise

We understand Oklahoma City's unique climate and housing styles, delivering solutions that last.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates and stick to our word.

Dedicated Team

Our skilled carpenters are passionate about their craft and dedicated to your satisfaction.

Ready to Transform Your Space?

Contact Ralph Goodman Finish Carpentry today for a free consultation and estimate.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Ralph and his team built the most gorgeous custom cabinets for my kitchen remodel. The quality is outstanding, and they were so easy to work with. They really listened to what I wanted and delivered beyond my expectations. Highly recommend!

Sarah J. Custom Cabinetry
“

We hired Ralph Goodman Finish Carpentry to install crown molding throughout our home in Nichols Hills. The work was precise and clean, and it made a huge difference in the overall look. There was a small delay due to weather, but they communicated well and kept us informed.

Michael B. Trim & Molding Installation
“

Ralph designed and built a custom shelving unit for my home office, and it's exactly what I needed. It's beautiful, functional, and perfectly fits the space. I appreciated their attention to detail and their willingness to work with my specific requirements.

Emily K. Custom Shelving
“

We needed a new front door after the last ice storm damaged ours. Ralph Goodman Finish Carpentry provided excellent service. The new door is secure, energy-efficient, and looks great. The installation was quick and professional.

David L. Door Installation
“

I had a window frame that was rotting due to water damage. Ralph's team came out and repaired it quickly and efficiently. They did a great job matching the existing trim and the repair is seamless. Very happy with their work.

Jessica M. Window Repair
“

Ralph and his crew built an amazing deck for our backyard. They were professional, reliable, and the craftsmanship is outstanding. We love spending time on our new deck, and it has significantly increased the value of our home.

Brian T. Deck Construction

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of wood do you use for custom cabinetry?
We offer a wide range of hardwoods, including oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and more. We can also source specialty woods upon request.
How long does it take to complete a custom cabinetry project?
The timeline depends on the complexity and size of the project. We'll provide a detailed estimate during the initial consultation.
Do you offer custom finishes and hardware?
Yes, we offer a wide variety of custom finishes, stains, and hardware options to perfectly match your style.
